trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 66.8 in the bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge — plus waste management is a defensive sector that hedges against macro uncertainty while still capturing momentum.

decisions.briefing: Markets logged a mild positive session — NASDAQ led at +0.9% while the S&P 500 added +0.3% — suggesting a cautiously optimistic but non-committal tape. OLED continues to strengthen from our entry cost and holds a top-tier momentum score. With $683 in idle cash and 5 open slots, I'm deploying into CWST: a score-95 defensive name (waste management) that rounds out our growth-heavy portfolio and satisfies the fill-open-slots rule in a low-risk way.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted a quiet but positive session on May 4, with the NASDAQ outperforming the broader S&P 500 as technology and growth names recovered from recent pressure. The divergence between NASDAQ (+0.9%) and S&P 500 (+0.3%) suggests selective buying rather than broad risk-on sentiment, consistent with investors rotating back into high-momentum growth names after trade-tariff uncertainty eased slightly. Defensive and utility-adjacent sectors also held up well, reflecting continued desire for downside protection alongside selective risk-taking.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股5月4日呈現溫和上揚格局，那斯達克指數以+0.9%的漲幅領跑，標普500指數則小漲0.3%。兩者表現分化，顯示市場資金選擇性地回流高動能成長股，而非全面性風險偏好回升，背後原因在於貿易關稅不確定性略有緩和。與此同時，防禦性板塊及類公用事業股票也表現穩健，反映投資人在捕捉成長機會的同時，仍保有相當程度的下行保護意識。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector diversification means spreading your portfolio across different industries so that a downturn in one area does not drag down the entire portfolio. By adding CWST (waste management — a defensive, recession-resistant sector) to a portfolio already heavy in tech and growth names like QQQ, AMD, and OLED, we reduce the risk that a single sector selloff wipes out gains. Think of it as not putting all your eggs in one basket — even when one basket looks very attractive.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊多元化是指將投資組合分散至不同產業，避免單一板塊下跌拖累整體表現。在我們已持有那斯達克ETF、AMD、OLED等科技成長股的情況下，加入CWST（廢棄物處理——一個防禦型、抗景氣循環的行業），能有效降低科技板塊若發生拋售時對整組合的衝擊。這就如同不把所有雞蛋放在同一個籃子裡——即便那個籃子看起來格外誘人。
